rationale: Split the long pseudo-selector assertion into a named predicate and standalone expectation in mission-control.test.tsx.
Reworked the awaiting_external check to assert directly against rendered status-pill hosts instead of a conditional closest() lookup that could skip coverage.
Applied the same direct rendered-host assertion strategy to finalizing pills so the regression guard cannot silently pass.
Top-level review summary only; the actionable items are tracked and addressed by the three inline review comments above.
